inputs.summary: Strong enterprise interest, but no commitment to a pilot because security review and procurement would take months.

state.interpretation: Demand appears real, but the current path to pilot is too high-friction for enterprise buyers.

recommendation.next_experiment: Test a lower-friction evaluation or pilot path that reduces or defers security and procurement burden.
example_variants: Sandbox or self-serve evaluation with no production data
Design-partner offer below common procurement thresholds
Security-ready package to shorten review time
success_metrics: Time from first conversation to evaluation start
Count of prospects willing to enter the new path
Breakdown of blockers: security, procurement, budget, ownership
